Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Fredric Evenson, Esq., Law Offices, 831-454-8216, for Plaintiff and moving party
Brenda Radmacher, Esq., from Wood, Smith, Henning & Berman LLP, 818-551-6000, for defendant Anawalt, Appearing by telephone
Nathan R. Hamler, Esq., from Mintz, Levin, Cohn, Ferris, Glovsky and Popeo, P.C., 858-314-1500, for defendant Probuilt, Appearing by telephone
Stephanie Walker, Esq., from Abbey, Weitzenberg, Warren & Emery, 707-521-2602 for defendants D&J Lumber Co., Inc. and Friedman's Home Improvement, Appearing by telephone

Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIROMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendants is Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with Health and Safety Code 25249.7(f)(4). Order and consent judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
